title: Number Basics and Classification
description: Understand different types of numbers: natural, whole, integers, rational, irrational.

exercises.solution:
0 → Whole number
-5 → Integer
2/3 → Rational
√2 → Irrational
7 → Natural/Whole/Integer

exercises.test: Find sum of first 20 natural numbers
exercises.concept: Sum of first n natural numbers = n(n+1)/2

exercises.solution: No, natural numbers start from 1. 0 is whole number.

exercises.concept: Between a and b: count = b-a+1

exercises.test: What type of number is √4? Explain.
exercises.concept: √4 = 2 is rational because it simplifies to a whole number
